examples: He was unwittingly caught up in the confrontation.
It was clear that, wittingly or unwittingly, he had offended her.
Wittingly or unwittingly, we make a myriad of connections with people around the world.
We have to admit, we found Cook's delivery funnier than the joke itself, albeit unwittingly.
Or does Dent's hyperbole undermine his case and unwittingly hint that the worst has passed?
